title: giliastrum purpusii subsp. stewartii
intro: Giliastrum purpusii subsp. stewartii is a plant species that belongs to the Polemoniaceae family, commonly known as the gilia or globe-flower family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Giliastrum purpusii subsp. stewartii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal formulations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
